description: MotherDuck is a cloud data warehouse built on DuckDB for querying, sharing, and analyzing data. It also provides AI-oriented workflows such as an MCP server for connecting AI clients to MotherDuck databases.
summary: MotherDuck exposes a preview REST Admin API with an OpenAPI spec, a remote MCP server at https://api.motherduck.com/mcp using OAuth or bearer tokens, and DuckDB CLI access authenticated via browser sign-in or access token.
